mapper.select: SELECT WRKTM_ID AS wrktmId , EMPLYR_ID AS emplyrId , ORGNZT_ID AS orgnztId , WRKT_DT AS wrktDt , WRK_START_TIME AS wrkStartTime , WRK_END_TIME AS wrkEndTime , WRK_HOURS AS wrkHours , OVTMWRK_HOURS AS ovtmwrkHours , WRK_START_STATUS AS wrkStartStatus , WRK_END_STATUS AS wrkEndStatus FROM TB_COMMUTE ORDER BY WRKT_DT DESC, WRKTM_ID DESC

SELECT WRKTM_ID AS wrktmId , EMPLYR_ID AS emplyrId , WRKT_DT AS wrktDt , WRK_START_TIME AS wrkStartTime , WRK_START_STATUS AS wrkStartStatus , WRK_END_STATUS AS wrkEndStatus FROM TB_COMMUTE WHERE EMPLYR_ID = #{emplyrId} AND WRKT_DT = #{wrktDt}
